ops.reason: Split RX Setup comparison into OLD → IDEATION → NEW sequence. Orig slide 9 becomes the NEW-only solution slide; before-* content migrated to the inserted OLD slide (below).

slide.label: RX Setup — After
slide.title: Users start scanning right away
slide.content: Users start right away — patient context fills in as they go, not as a prerequisite.
issues: Procedure selection tied to teeth structure
slide.caption: New RX setup — single-view, no blocking form. (Add vid-aouv40ns6o0.mp4)

ops.reason: OLD: RX Setup slide — shows the blocking multi-step form before the redesign. Migrates beforeDescription + beforeBullets from orig comparison slide 9. Inserted between chapter 7 and directions slide 8 so the RX beat reads: chapter → OLD → IDEATION → NEW.

slide.label: RX Setup — Before
slide.title: Setup blocked the scan before it could start
slide.content: The old product was a dense, multi-step form — patient and procedure gated behind a blocking modal before scanning could begin.
issues: Patient selection required a multi-step modal
Procedure had to be defined upfront
Dropdown disconnected from the dental chart
slide.highlight: Every second here was a second the patient sat waiting.
slide.caption: Old RX setup — the blocking multi-step form. (Add img-uykask3eo.webp)

ops.reason: Split Scan Toolbar comparison into OLD → IDEATION → NEW sequence. Orig slide 13 becomes the NEW-only solution slide; before-* content migrated to the inserted OLD slide (below). Icon redesign work from context.md lands here via bullets2.

slide.label: Scan Toolbar — After
slide.title: One toolbar, one visual language
slide.content: A unified icon set in a collapsible toolbar — one visual language, one fixed location.
issues: Unified icon set — each maps to its action
One collapsible toolbar, always in the same place
Scalable — new tools slot in without disruption
bullets2: Toolbar and procedure icons rebuilt into one visual system
Every tool reads at a glance — nothing to memorise
slide.highlight: Tools were now one tap away — comparing more than one scan was the next problem.
slide.caption: New collapsible toolbar + unified icon set. (Add vid-g2r58c0dp9s.mp4)

ops.reason: OLD: Scan Toolbar slide — shows scattered, mixed-style icons with no consistent home. Migrates beforeDescription + beforeBullets from orig comparison slide 13. Inserted between chapter 11 and directions slide 12 so the Toolbar beat reads: chapter → OLD → IDEATION → NEW.

slide.label: Scan Toolbar — Before
slide.title: Tools scattered, with no home
slide.content: Icons built up from different sources, no shared style — and no consistent place to find them.
issues: No shared visual language across icons
Every new feature added more scatter
slide.caption: Old toolbar — scattered, mixed-style icons. (Add img-c1djiu0kh0.webp — DESIGNER: confirm this image shows icon fragmentation, else supply a real old-toolbar screenshot.)
